text:
EXPLANATION: No academic article with this exact title exists; the citation appears to be a hallucinated entry that has propagated into the reference lists of several recent AI-generated arXiv papers. The listed authors (Kuprov, Wagner-Rundell, Hore) did publish a real 2007 paper in the Journal of Magnetic Resonance, but it has a different title and topic.
